ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #12, REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Oct-19-2016 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Brian Fearnow for (petitioner) De La Salle Institute.

The Court stated that it is looking for a declaration with itemized entries and a copy of the will or the 1980 judgment. Mr. Fearnow stated that they have never had the 1980 judgment and that he will file a copy of the will and a declaration. The accounting petition was taken under submission.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Grimaldi. (Not Reported)

FUTURE ACCOUNTING
Off Calendar Jul-06-2016 Continued To Aug-03-16 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to Brian Fearnow, attorney for the trustee to appear on August 3, 2016 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why the accounting petition has not been filed and why there was no appearance this morning. The status hearing is also continued to that date.
